verifier_values.criteria: Produces a bar chart in "chart" sheet.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt specifically requests to produce a bar chart showing the Loss Inflation Adjusted per loan for each Region.

verifier_values.criteria: Produces exactly 5 bars in the bar chart.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt explicity requires the model to create a bar chart with Region on the x-axis. There are exactly 5 Regions hence there should be 5 bars.

verifier_values.criteria: Places Region on the x-axis of the chart.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt explicity requires the model to use Region in the x-axis.

verifier_values.criteria: Places Loss Inflation Adjusted per loan on the y-axis of the chart.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt explicity requires the model to use  Loss Inflation Adjusted per loan in the y-axis.

verifier_values.criteria: Labels the Loss Inflation Adjusted per loan for Central as exactly 459,512 (acceptable range 454,917 to 464,107).
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt specifically requests to create a bar chart that shows Loss Inflation Adjusted per loan by Region only for the Construction sector. 459,512 is the correct Loss Inflation Adjusted per loan for Central Region.
